languages.text: {n}Стоящая рядом с ним женщина кланяется, не сводя с вас единственного глаза. Ее голос, звонкий и ясный, разрезает напряженный гомон толпы.{/n} "Вы прибыли обновить нашу присягу, Ваше Сиятельство!?"
{n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
languages.original_text: {n}Стоящая рядом с ним женщина кланяется, не сводя с вас единственного глаза. Ее голос, звонкий и ясный, разрезает напряженный гомон толпы.{/n} "Вы прибыли обновить нашу присягу, Ваше Сиятельство!?"

traits.locale_text: {n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixes on you. Her voice rings out with clarity, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you arrived to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
{n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
{n}The woman, staring at you, once again cannot help herself:{/n} "Lord Captain, have you finally come to renew our oaths?" {n}You can hear the entreaty and hope in her voice.{/n}

{n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixes on you. Her voice rings out with clarity, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you arrived to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
{n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
{n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

languages.text: {n}あなたをじっと見つめるその女性は、再び堪えきれず、こう言った。{/n}「艦長様、ついに誓いの更新にいらっしゃったのですか？」{n}彼女の声には、懇願と希望が込められている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman, staring at you, once again cannot help herself:{/n} "Lord Captain, have you finally come to renew our oaths?" {n}You can hear the entreaty and hope in her voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたをじっと見つめるその女性は、再び堪えきれず、こう言った。{n}「艦長様、ついに誓いの更新にいらっしゃったのですか？」{n}彼女の声には、懇願と希望が込められている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die neben ihm stehende Frau verbeugt sich. Ihr eines Auge ist auf dich gerichtet. Ihre Stimme durchschneidet das laute Murmeln der Menge.{/n} "Seid Ihr gekommen, um unseren Eid zu erneuern, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"
languages.original_text: {n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Die neben ihm stehende Frau verbeugt sich. Ihr eines Auge ist auf dich gerichtet. Ihre Stimme durchschneidet das laute Murmeln der Menge.{/n} "Seid Ihr gekommen, um unseren Eid zu erneuern, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"

languages.text: {n}La femme qui se tient à côté de lui s'incline, son unique œil valide rivé sur vous. Quand elle prend la parole, sa voix retentit par-dessus le brouhaha de la foule.{/n} « Vous êtes {mf|venu|venue} renouveler notre serment, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La femme qui se tient à côté de lui s'incline, son unique œil valide rivé sur vous. Quand elle prend la parole, sa voix retentit par-dessus le brouhaha de la foule.{/n} « Vous êtes {mf|venu|venue} renouveler notre serment, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: {n}La mujer que tiene al lado hace una reverencia y clava en ti su único ojo. Su voz resuena, atravesando el murmullo del gentío.{/n} «¿Viene a renovar nuestro juramento, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».
languages.original_text: {n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La mujer que tiene al lado hace una reverencia y clava en ti su único ojo. Su voz resuena, atravesando el murmullo del gentío.{/n} «¿Viene a renovar nuestro juramento, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».

languages.text: {n}Yanında duran kadın, tek gözü sana sabitlenmiş hâlde eğiliyor. Sesi, kalabalığın ağır uğultusunu delecek şekilde yankılanıyor.{/n} "Yeminlerimizi tazelemeye mi geldiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"
languages.original_text: {n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Yanında duran kadın, tek gözü sana sabitlenmiş hâlde eğiliyor. Sesi, kalabalığın ağır uğultusunu delecek şekilde yankılanıyor.{/n} "Yeminlerimizi tazelemeye mi geldiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"

languages.text: {n}站在他身边的女人鞠了一躬，用独眼紧盯着你。她的声音响起，穿透了人群嘈杂的低语声。{/n}“舰长大人，您是来重续我们的誓言的吗？”
languages.original_text: {n}The woman standing beside him bows, her single eye fixed on you. Her voice rings out, piercing the heavy buzz of the crowd.{/n} "Have you come to renew our oaths, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}站在他身边的女人鞠了一躬，用独眼紧盯着你。她的声音响起，穿透了人群嘈杂的低语声。{/n}“舰长大人，您是来重续我们的誓言的吗？”
